problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor — specifically Synaptic plasticity modulation — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
